title: narcissus poeticus var. grandiflorus
intro: Narcissus poeticus var. grandiflorus, also known as the Large Poet's Narcissus, is a perennial plant belonging to the Amaryllidaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's health benefits include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and possess antioxidant properties, although more research is needed to confirm these effects. Herbal preparations of Narcissus poeticus var. grandiflorus are typically made from its bulbs and flowers, which can be used to create teas, tinctures, and infusions.
